description: Capture submitted prompts and reconcile them with the active Git branch.

hooks.command: node --input-type=module -e "import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; const root = process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT || process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT; await import(pathToFileURL(root + '/dist/rudder-prompt-hook.mjs').href)"

node --input-type=module -e "import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; const root = process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT || process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT; await import(pathToFileURL(root + '/dist/rudder-prompt-hook.mjs').href)"
